name: ghduty
description: GitHub duty — automated agent that queues the GitHub work waiting on you across all repos (PRs awaiting your review, issues/PRs assigned to you, and issues/PRs mentioning you — durable state queries, not the ephemeral notification inbox) and handles each in parallel: reply directly, /ticket on change requests (filed in the repo's clone under a configurable working folder), /code-review on review requests, optional Slack notify on tickets created. Idempotent by its own reply signature. Built to run on a schedule.
